title: Groups
noGroup: You need to create or join a group to see people on your dashboard.

create.title: Create new group
create.description: Pick a title for a new group of things and people.

title.label: Group name

update.title: Update group

title.label: Group name
title.error: All groups must have a name

invite.title: Invite to group
invite.description: Write the email of the person you'd like to invite to this group and choose a role for them. They will receive an email with the join OTP.

join.title: Join group
join.description: Enter the OTP code sent to your email.

code.label: Enter you invite code here
code.error: Password must be at least 6 characters
